description: Grant a customer access to a digital file through a manual order for a physical product in WooCommerce. Create a virtual and downloadable simple product named 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' ($0.00, dummy file URL) and a physical simple product named 'Physical Training Manual' ($50.00). Generate a completed manual order containing only the 'Physical Training Manual'. Manually grant this order permissions for the 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' with the downloads remaining set to 5.
